# PEGIN — Penguin Gateway Identity

> Fully decentralized SSO on Chia + DIG Network. Passkey login anchored to a Chia DID.
> AI/RAG: use docs/ai/chunks.jsonl and docs/ai/CONTEXT.md. Do not ingest HTML wiki or wiki/PEGIN_Wiki.md.

## AI entry points

- [System context](docs/ai/CONTEXT.md): compact facts for agents
- [Manifest](docs/ai/manifest.json): 33 documents, 256 RAG chunks
- [Usage guide](docs/ai/USAGE.md): Cursor, RAG pipelines, Claude Projects
- [Doc index](docs/README.md): human navigation
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): coding agent conventions

## Canonical documentation

### Developer documentation (primary)

- [PEGIN developer documentation](docs/08-developer/README.md): **Start here if you build or integrate PEGIN.** Specs, architecture, SDK, and protocol reference live in this folder....
- [Architecture](docs/08-developer/architecture/README.md): System design for identity on **Chia** and data on **DIG**.
- [PEGIN + DIG Network: Enterprise Application Architecture Transformation](docs/08-developer/architecture/dig-enterprise-transformation.md): > **The Insight:** PEGIN (authentication + permissions) + DIG Network (data) solve the infrastructure layer entirely....
- [DIG Network Incentives + PEGIN DSSO Integration](docs/08-developer/architecture/dig-incentives-integration.md): > **Direction:** DIG stores PEGIN identity data; peers may earn network incentives (e.g. XCH) for storage and proofs....
- [PEGIN On-Chain Architecture](docs/08-developer/architecture/on-chain-architecture.md): *Technical architecture — blockchain-only design (Chia + optional DIG)*
- [Integration](docs/08-developer/integration/README.md): Integrate **Login with PEGIN** in your application.
- [PEGIN SDK integration guide](docs/08-developer/integration/sdk-guide.md): > **Developer hub:** [../README.md](../README.md) · **Spec 1:** [../specs/tech-stack.md](../specs/tech-stack.md) · **...
- [Permissions (PePP)](docs/08-developer/permissions/README.md): **Phase 2** — not part of the SSO POC.
- [Permission data model (PePP)](docs/08-developer/permissions/permission-data-model.md): Technical reference for Phase 2. Not implemented in POC.
- [Future products (Penguin)](docs/08-developer/products/README.md): Technical designs after PEGIN core SSO. See [roadmap.md](../../03-use-cases/roadmap.md) Phase 4+.
- [Pengin Gateway — Technical Architecture](docs/08-developer/products/gateway-architecture.md): _Decentralized SSO on Chia + DIG_
- [Penguin Vault — Technical Architecture](docs/08-developer/products/vault-architecture.md): *Implementation guide — Chia + DIG*
- [Specifications](docs/08-developer/specs/README.md): Implementation specs for PEGIN engineers. Read **Spec 1** before writing code; read **Spec 2** before enterprise prot...
- [Spec 2 — Enterprise identity (AD / Entra parity)](docs/08-developer/specs/enterprise-identity-spec.md): > **Goal:** PEGIN as a decentralized IdP that can **federate with** or **replace** Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) for ...
- [Spec 1 — PEGIN technical stack (Chia + POC)](docs/08-developer/specs/tech-stack.md): > **PEGIN** = **P**enguin **G**ateway **I**de**n**tity — decentralized SSO on Chia + DIG.

### Use cases & roadmap

- [Structural differentiators vs centralized SSO](docs/03-use-cases/differentiators.md): > **Purpose:** Explain what a user-owned DID enables that traditional IdPs are not designed to do.
- [POC & MVP — Login with PEGIN](docs/03-use-cases/mvp-strategy.md): User → "Login with PEGIN" → passkey (WebAuthn) → Chia DID verified → JWT → app
- [PEGIN product roadmap](docs/03-use-cases/roadmap.md): > Single plan for what we build, in what order, and what is explicitly **future**. Timelines are planning estimates u...

### Product

- [PEGIN Complete Ecosystem — SSO + Permission Management](docs/02-product/complete-ecosystem.md): PEGIN combines **passwordless SSO** (user-held DID) with a planned **permission layer (PePP)** on DIG. This doc descr...
- [PEGIN Permission Platform (PePP) — Decentralized Access Control](docs/02-product/permission-platform.md): > **Phase:** [Phase 2 in roadmap](../03-use-cases/roadmap.md) — not part of POC.

### Vision

- [PEGIN — Timeless Business Principles & Customer Value Proposition](docs/01-vision/business-principles.md): These principles transcend technology trends, market cycles, and management fads. They work because they align incent...
- [PEGIN's Core Value: Your Login Belongs To You, Not Your Company](docs/01-vision/core-value-user-owned-login.md): > **The Core Truth:** Your login should belong to YOU, not your employer. PEGIN makes this real.
- [PEGIN — Fully Decentralized](docs/01-vision/fully-decentralized.md): *Enterprise SSO + custody on Chia and DIG (no central servers)*

### Business

- [PEGIN competitive positioning](docs/05-business/competitive-moat.md): PEGIN does not win by quoting a lower **per-seat price** than Okta or Entra before anyone has run a pilot. It wins — ...
- [PEGIN Enterprise Business Plan](docs/05-business/enterprise-business-plan.md): Enterprise-grade decentralized SSO — **planning doc**. Competes with Azure AD / Okta at the **app SSO layer** (SAML/O...
- [PEGIN sustainable funding model](docs/05-business/sustainable-funding.md): PEGIN targets **open-source core** (no per-seat license as the default story) and revenue from **infrastructure, serv...
